blended.narrative: Afton Alps is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,392 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: light rain showers, highs of 39°F.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
